change: Add a matrix section for models, executors, reasoning variants, prompt frameworks, fixtures, repeats, timeout, and scorer selection.
Represent RCAF/RACE/CIDI/TIDD-EC/COSTAR-style prompt techniques as config templates with shared output contracts and fixture variable interpolation.
Promote dispatch from single prompt_file to framework x fixture x model x variant matrix orchestration while reusing dispatch-model.cjs executor mapping.
Add configurable metric plugins for hidden JS assertions, extraction, format adherence, output length, pattern scoring, and 5dim scoring with profile-defined weights.
Add leaderboard/group-by reporting for framework/model/variant axes while retaining Lane B report.json and report-history provenance.
Support fixture packs beyond JSON artifact contracts, including code-task fixtures with hidden tests and extractor/test-runner adapter metadata.
Separate correctness categories from format-adherence; keep format as a secondary lane so saturated correctness cannot produce misleading winners.
Adopt JSON+sidecar fixture packs with category, tier, prompt, visibleSpec, scope, hidden oracle, scoring hooks, expectedDifficulty, and saturation policy.
Retire chunk/parseRange from ranking use or demote them to T1 smoke fixtures; replace with T3/T4 bug-in-context, multi-file, adversarial, and strict-acceptance fixtures.
Generalize the 126 hidden tests into fixed held-out tests plus seeded randomized/property cases and adversarial edge pools.
Auto-flag fixtures where multiple model/framework cells all score 100% correctness with zero variance; require promote, demote-to-smoke, or retire action.
Add explicit long-context and tool-use/agentic fixtures; current requested files show scoring primitives but not a true long-context or required-tool-use fixture.
Introduce a reusable dimension-vector scoring contract and plugin registry around existing deterministic checks and grader harness.
Replace scorer enum pattern|5dim with profile-configurable scorer plugins and pass profile rubric/weights into scorer calls.
Adapt hidden assertion pass rate, format adherence, output length, and latency into reusable deterministic scorers.
Generalize D4-only grader harness into named graded dimensions while preserving prompt-specific JSON contracts and cache keys.
Add anti-saturation policy: correctness as gate once saturated, then rank survivors by efficiency, format/scope, and graded reasoning.
Expose token and dollar cost fields for true token-efficiency scoring; currently only words/chars/ms are evidenced.
Make samplesPerCell/repeat a required statistical dimension in outputs and compute per-cell aggregates instead of treating repeat as a manual rerun knob.
Add dependency-free paired bootstrap CI, MAD noise-floor estimation, median/mean/p90 aggregators, and deterministic seeded resampling.
Gate winner claims behind N>=k, margin>noiseFloor, and positive paired 90% CI; otherwise emit TIE or INCONCLUSIVE.
Replace repeatabilityTolerance=0 with a nonzero profile default or an explicit calibration mode; zero tolerance contradicts observed single-sample noise.
Promote repeatabilityTolerance from passive report metadata into an active pass/fail or trustworthiness threshold.
Reuse plateau/MAD concepts for benchmark stabilization, but adapt the signal to top-pair margin and CI-width stability rather than mutation exhaustion.
Return normalized dispatch envelopes with output, stdout, stderr, latency_ms, exit_code, attempts, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_usd, executor, provider, model, variant.
For cli-opencode, support --format json and parse newline JSON events for assistant output and any available usage/cost fields; leave missing usage as null.
Promote provider quirks from prose notes into machine-readable fields: model_slug, default_variant, variant_flag, agent_policy, format_mode, quota_pool.
Add a sweep runner/profile loader that expands models[], executors[], variants[] and filters invalid combinations through the capability table.
Add executor-specific metric parsers for Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Devin where their CLIs expose usage; otherwise preserve nulls with parser_status.
Document whether OpenCode session.completed payload includes token/cost fields in the current binary; current repo evidence only proves event stream shape, not usage fields.
Create a machine-readable framework registry for the canonical seven frameworks with id, description, applies_to, template, slots, and output_contract.
Replace hard-coded render(fixture) functions with registry-backed template rendering so framework additions are data changes.
Generalize slot interpolation into a reusable renderer with required-slot validation and support for framework plus technique axes.
Replace freeform prompt-framework notes with structured prompt_profile fields: framework, preplanning_density, output_contract, and optional mutation_policy.
Keep mutation optional, but map existing axis mutations to registry operators and render mutated variants from metadata instead of copying a seed body.
Add custom framework template loading via manifest entries so user-defined techniques can be profile-referenced without code changes.
Add optional additive keys for mode, sweep axes, scoring, sampling, reporting, and execution while preserving legacy fixtureDir/fixtures/benchmark keys.
Implement dependency-free enum and required-key validation before materialization or sweep expansion.
Map scoring.dimensions to score-model-variant rubric.dims and keep --scorer pattern as the default when scoring is absent.
Use models/frameworks/variants to expand dispatch cells and feed executor/model/variant/timeout/mock into dispatch-model.cjs.
Support one extends profile plus overrides using deep object merge and array replacement.
Use reporting.groupBy and leaderboard only in the new sweep report layer; leave current report.json unchanged for legacy runs.
Emit WINNER/TIE/INCONCLUSIVE with reason and confidence before any leaderboard winner text.
Generate persisted aggregate rows with group, n, mean, median, CI, saturation, top-pair delta, and trustworthiness verdict.
Extend reporting.groupBy into multiple leaderboards with explicit groupBy and rankBy arrays for model-vs-model, framework-vs-framework, and per-dimension ranking.
Reuse Lane B stable report plus immutable report-history snapshot pattern, adding git_sha, profile_hash, fixture_hashes, model_versions, executor_versions, seed, and schema_version.
Generate human synthesis from aggregate.json with per-dimension breakdown, saturation table, trust verdict, leaderboard tables, regression block, and reproducibility block.
Add nullable tokens and cost fields to raw rows; current evidence shows ms/output words exist but token and cost fields are UNKNOWN/not emitted.
Add first-class profile fields: mode, sweep.axis, sweep.values, fixed, gate, leaderboard.groupBy.
Add a generic sweep expander for Lane B that runs the same materialize -> dispatch -> run-benchmark path per cell, without situation-specific branches.
Persist sweep cell metadata on report rows and benchmark_run records: mode, axis, cellId, fixed values, group keys.
Expose variant/reasoningEffort from profile cells, reusing existing executor-specific forwarding.
Document A-F as profile modes with defaults, emphasizing that only profile shape changes, not rig code.
Add grouped leaderboard and capability radar reducers for groupBy=model|promptFramework|variant|prompt|category,tier,dimension.
Add additive profile keys for mode, sweep axes, models, frameworks, variants, scoring gate, sampling, and reporting while preserving current Lane B profile keys.
Add a generic matrix expander over models x executors x variants x frameworks x fixtures x samples that feeds Lane B dispatch/scoring without mode-specific rig branches.
Create a machine-readable framework registry and slot renderer so RCAF/RACE/CIDI/TIDD-EC/COSTAR-style bake-offs are data-driven.
Reuse the 5dim and deterministic scorer stack, but make correctness a gate and report per-dimension scores separately.
Add a small T3/T4 fixture pack with hidden deterministic oracles; keep current artifact-contract fixtures as smoke/regression only.
Emit trustworthiness verdict WINNER/TIE/INCONCLUSIVE plus saturation status before leaderboard output.
Add dependency-free mean, median, MAD, quantile, seeded paired bootstrap CI, and noise-floor utilities.
Return normalized dispatch envelopes with latency, provider/model metadata, nullable token/cost fields, and OpenCode JSON parsing where available.
Add grouped leaderboard reducers and saturation auto-detect by fixture, dimension, model, framework, and variant.
Add single-parent profile extends, custom framework template loading, and optional hill-climb over framework and technique axes.
